name: Claude (Product)
description: Verified app, desktop, mobile, and add-in launches from Claude.
headline: Verified Claude product launches across {days} days.
subtitle: January 12 — March 17, 2026. Cross-checked against official Claude release notes and product pages.
footnote: Cross-checked on March 31, 2026 against official Claude Help Center release notes, Claude product posts, and Anthropic announcements.

releases.title: Cowork research preview on Claude Desktop
releases.description: Anthropic introduced Cowork as an agentic desktop workspace for knowledge work beyond coding.

releases.title: Interactive connectors and MCP Apps
releases.description: Claude gained interactive connectors that can render and operate live app interfaces in chat.

releases.title: Claude for PowerPoint
releases.description: Claude shipped as a PowerPoint add-in for drafting, editing, and restructuring slide decks.

releases.title: Cowork plugins and admin controls
releases.description: Team and Enterprise users got Cowork plugins plus organization-level controls.

releases.title: Chat search and memory for free users
releases.description: Memory from chat history expanded beyond paid plans to all Claude users.

releases.title: Claude for Excel and PowerPoint work across apps
releases.description: Claude began sharing full context across open Excel and PowerPoint workflows.

releases.title: Custom visuals in chat
releases.description: Claude started generating interactive charts, diagrams, and visual explanations inline in chat.

releases.title: Persistent Cowork thread from mobile
releases.description: Pro and Max users got a persistent Cowork thread that can be managed from Claude mobile apps.
